message:
fix(tui,server): DB retry cooldown, hydration guard, lazy graph compute, perf improvements

queries.rs: skip flush_deferred_touches early via has_pending_touches()
check before drain, avoiding unnecessary mutex/SQL work when empty

lib.rs: cache ws_state_fallback: Arc<TuiSharedState> on HttpState instead
of constructing fresh TuiSharedState per /mail/ws-state poll request

tui_bridge.rs: add screen_diagnostics_recent(screen, limit) for efficient
reverse-chronological filtered lookup with limit (avoids full scan + filter
+ reverse + take)

threads.rs: guard ensure_db_conn on db_conn_attempted to prevent redundant
retry attempts; on failure, set last_refresh timestamp and reset
db_conn_attempted for proper cooldown cycle

tool_metrics.rs: restructure hydration condition to explicitly handle
first-tick case (last_persisted_hydrate_tick == 0) and require interval
due AND (map empty OR stats dirty)

contacts.rs: defer graph events and metrics computation into branches that
actually need them, avoiding build_graph_flow_metrics on every render tick
in table mode

tui_ws_state.rs: use events_since_limited(since, limit) instead of
events_since + truncate to avoid over-allocation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
